baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, legacy full-sort doc ranking
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs using the legacy document scorer and full sort across 12 real quest/doc queries and 6 visible docs

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, indexed top-N doc ranking
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs using preindexed search surfaces plus bounded top-N maintenance across the same 12 real quest/doc queries and 6 visible docs

environment.note: Indexed ranking was benchmarked with index-build cost included, and it matched the legacy ranking output exactly for the sampled control-plane query set.
